results.question: What was the Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2023/24?
What gap existed between the resource ceiling and actual spend on core NHS Grampian services in 2023/24?

acceptable_evidence.note: Primary financial performance table showing the core revenue resource limit, actual expenditure, and resulting surplus.
Supporting financial statement page that cross-checks the reported actual spend figure used in the comparison.

results.question: What surplus did NHS Grampian report against the Core Revenue Resource Limit in 2023/24?
What was the underlying deficit against the Core Revenue Resource Limit for 2023/24?
How much brokerage did Scottish Government provide NHS Grampian in 2023/24?
What share of the total revenue resource ceiling related to non-core technical accounting items in 2023/24?
What was the net expenditure for NHS Grampian in 2023/24 and by how much did it increase from the prior year?
What was the total annual cost of running NHS Grampian's health and care operations in 2023/24, and how did the cost base shift year-on-year?
What was the projected deficit in the financial plan submitted in March 2023 before additional funding was confirmed?
By what amount did drugs and medical supplies expenditure increase in 2023/24?
What was NHS Grampian's clinical negligence and employer liability provision at year end 2023/24?
What was the total income and expenditure for NHS Grampian Charity in 2023/24?
How many directly employed staff did NHS Grampian have in 2023/24?

acceptable_evidence.note: Overview section stating that the Delivery Plan 2023-2026 was adopted by the Board in August 2023.
Governance section providing the wider Delivery Plan timeline and approval context.

results.question: What was the net expenditure figure in Note 2A Summary of Core Revenue Resource Outturn for 2023/24?
results.expected_subsection: NOTE 2. A. SUMMARY OF CORE REVENUE RESOURCE OUTTURN

results.question: What efficiency savings did NHS Grampian achieve in 2023/24 against its target?
What were the recurring and non-recurring efficiency savings for 2023/24?
How did the 2023/24 efficiency savings target compare to the previous year's target?
What were the main areas where efficiency savings were achieved in 2023/24?
What Programme Management Office function was implemented to support savings delivery in 2023/24?
By how much did efficiency savings achieved in 2023/24 exceed the target?
What deficit did Aberdeen City IJB report in 2023/24 and what were its reserves carried forward?
What deficit did Aberdeenshire IJB report in 2023/24 and what were its reserves at year end?

Why did IJB reserves reduce significantly in 2023/24?
Which IJBs required an additional transfer of resource from NHS Grampian in 2023/24 due to depletion of reserves?
What were the consolidated net assets for all three IJBs as a joint venture in 2023/24?
What was the total IJB health services income in NHS Grampian's accounts for 2023/24?
How did the Aberdeen City IJB's earmarked reserves change between 2022/23 and 2023/24?
What were the total A&E attendances in March 2024 and how did they compare to March 2023?
What percentage of A&E patients were seen within 4 hours in March 2024?
How many patients waited over 4 hours and over 12 hours in A&E in March 2024?
How did the number of patients waiting over 12 hours in A&E change between March 2023 and March 2024?
How many patients were experiencing delayed discharge at the March 2024 census date?
How did delayed discharge numbers compare between March 2023 and March 2024?
When was the Delivery Plan 2023-2026 adopted by the NHS Grampian Board?

acceptable_evidence.note: Overview section stating that the Delivery Plan 2023-2026 was adopted by the Board in August 2023.
Governance section providing the wider Delivery Plan timeline and approval context.

results.question: When was the Delivery Plan 2023-2026 approved by the Scottish Government?
What are the three strategic objectives in NHS Grampian's Delivery Plan 2023-2026?
What strategic plan underpins the Delivery Plan 2023-2026 and what period does it cover?
What is the Integrated Performance Assurance Framework developed in 2023/24 for?

acceptable_evidence.note: Primary description of the Integrated Performance Assurance Framework and its purpose in aligning reporting and milestone monitoring.
Overview page linking the framework to Delivery Plan objectives and wider performance management.

results.question: To which escalation stage was NHS Grampian elevated in November 2023 and why?

acceptable_evidence.note: Chief Executive overview stating the move from Stage 1 to Stage 2 in November 2023.
Performance analysis page tying the escalation explicitly to the Board's financial position.

results.question: What was the underlying reason for NHS Grampian's escalation in 2023/24?

acceptable_evidence.note: Primary financial explanation that the Board could not set a balanced revenue budget and required brokerage funding.
Overview page describing the resulting pressure on the health system in the North East.

results.question: What risk-based approach did the Chief Executive Team implement to manage the financial challenge in 2023/24?
What is the Grampian Operational Pressure Escalation System (G-OPES) and was it used in 2023/24?
What review of G-OPES pathways was undertaken in 2023/24?
What governance arrangements exist for G-OPES level decisions in 2023/24?
What was the first time NHS Grampian overspent against its revenue budget?
What actions were taken in 2023/24 to combat the financial overspend?
What is the value and sustainability programme and when was it significantly developed?
What was the average credit taken for invoice payment in 2023/24?
What infrastructure investment programme did NHS Grampian deliver in 2023/24?
